allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Attio CRM import with dynamic field mapping

- Add field mapping UI for Attio import similar to CSV import
- Filter out system columns \(Entry ID, Added to list at/by\)
- Add parent record \(company/firm name\) as mappable column
- Fetch and display sample values for each column
- Add fuzzy matching to auto-suggest field mappings
- Support tooltips showing example data on hover

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = sys.stdin.read\(\); idx = data.find\(''''__NEXT_DATA__''''\); print\(data[idx:idx+500] if idx != -1 else ''''No Next data found''''\)")
